song.title: The Cleansing Wave
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Oh, now I see the cleansing wave! The fountain deep and wide; Jesus, my Lord, mighty to save, Points to His wounded side.
[C] Chorus The cleansing stream I see, I see; I plunge, and oh, it cleanses me! Oh, praise the Lord, it cleanses me! It cleanses me, yes, cleanses me!
[V2] 2) I see the dear Redeemer raised, I hear the speaking blood; It speaks! My spirit is amazed! And quickened by its flood.
[V3] 3) I rise to walk in God’s own light Above the world and sin, With heart renewed and garments white And Christ enthroned within.
song.author: Phoebe Worrell Palmer
